title: STRATA evaluation artifacts and reproducibility code (strata-sagemaker)
description: Public evaluation artifact for the paper "STRATA: A Name-and-Geography Race Inference Model for Fair Lending and Housing Equity Applications" (Chalavadi, Leitch, and Pastor). Contains versioned, de-identified prediction files for every reported model and ablation, the evaluation and plotting code, a locked software environment, artifact checksums, PPP cohort-construction and scoring scripts, and a synthetic test dataset. Every table, figure, confidence interval, and statistical test in the paper is regenerable from the frozen prediction files (make reproduce). No names, addresses, loan identifiers, or voter-file identifiers are distributed. Model training code and weights are withheld (commercial); the merged voter-file training corpus is not redistributed (individually race-labeled and geocoded). Code is licensed Apache-2.0; released prediction and data artifacts are licensed CC-BY-4.0.
notes: TODO before release: (1) add Pastor ORCID if available (Chalavadi and Leitch ORCIDs already set); (2) after the DMLR DOI is assigned, add a related_identifiers entry {"identifier": "<DMLR DOI>", "relation": "isSupplementTo", "scheme": "doi"}; (3) bump "version" to match the GitHub release tag.
